title: Foraging And Farming
description: This reworks the way farming and foraging for minecraft food!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c408b61f0fd4d8d8b1900a8c76581ed6d13e25f2.png)

# What Is it?
This is a datapack that changes farming in minecraft to a more realistic gameplay. By adding dirty crops when you dig the crops off the ground to washing the crops in a water source. This also adds enchants and a cool hat. You also have to cook your bread after turning it into dough. You can also cook mushrooms and dig them up from the ground. Collecting Acorns is from oak leaves that sometimes drop it.

## How do you Wash Crops?
You wash crops by dropping it in either water or a cauldron with water. But you have to do it one at a time or the crops won't get cleaned fully.
![The Crops](https://i.postimg.cc/65XMcr2V/Dirty-Crops.png)

# What Enchantments are there?
There is currently 2 enchantments. One is called "Golden Touch" which makes it so that when you harvest crops you get some golden of the type of crop too. The Other one is called "Harvest Wisdom" which gives you one experience orb every crop you mine.

## How do you make bread?
You make bread by throwing the wheat in water or water cauldron one by one. Then you drop the dough on a heat block like a cooking furnace, campfire, or magma block. Then you got your bread!
![Bread and dough picture](https://i.postimg.cc/J45P2sZf/Dirty-Crops-1.png)

# How do you make the Farmer's hat?
The Farmers hat is crafted by 5 wheat and 1 string in a helmet with the string in the middle of  the wheat. Image provided to see the crafting recipe:
![Crafting Recipe For Farmers Hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5368b69401196652710b4cd24d797db8ff179b0c.png)
